results.rendered_html:
aroga a. Free from disease, healthy, sound, well; arogāḥ sarvasiddhārthāścaturvarṣaśatāyuṣaḥ  Suśr. 
— gaḥ Sound health; na nāmamātreṇa karotyarogaṃ  H. 1. 167.
